project_type: TypeScript AWS CDK infrastructure-as-code project (sleep audio pipeline)
build_system: npm with tsc for compilation, CDK CLI for synthesis
test_framework: Jest with ts-jest transform, using aws-cdk-lib/assertions Template.fromStack() and Match utilities. Snapshot testing via toMatchSnapshot(). setupFilesAfterEnv uses aws-cdk-lib/testhelpers/jest-autoclean.
verification_instructions: 1. Run `npx jest --updateSnapshot` to execute all tests and update snapshots. 2. Run `npx cdk synth` to verify CloudFormation template generation. Both must pass cleanly.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install npm packages from registry. Node.js v22 available via nvm. No Docker daemon needed for this task.
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD: write failing tests first, then minimal implementation. Conventional commits required. ARCHITECTURE.md must be updated for any infrastructure changes. L2/L3 CDK constructs preferred. Least-privilege IAM.
key_patterns: Single stack in lib/cdk-base-stack.ts. Tests in test/cdk-base.test.ts use beforeAll to create template once. Tests use Template.hasResourceProperties, resourceCountIs, Match.objectLike, Match.arrayWith, Match.stringLikeRegexp. State machine definition is verified by matching patterns in the Fn::Join DefinitionString. IAM policies tested via AWS::IAM::Policy resource properties. Snapshot test at the end captures full synthesized template.
directory_structure: lib/ - CDK stack definitions. test/ - Jest test files with __snapshots__/ subdirectory. bin/ - CDK app entry point. .github/workflows/ci.yml - CI pipeline (npm ci, npm test, cdk synth).
